org.bytedeco.onnxruntime

Class OrtEpApi

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.bytedeco.javacpp.Pointer
      • org.bytedeco.onnxruntime.OrtEpApi
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    AutoCloseable

    @Properties(inherit=onnxruntime.class)
public class OrtEpApi
extends Pointer
    \brief The OrtEpApi struct provides functions that are relevant to the implementation of an execution provider.
    Since:
    Version 1.22.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static class  OrtEpApi.GetSyncIdForLastWaitOnSyncStream_OrtSyncStream_OrtSyncStream
      \brief Get the sync ID for the last time the consumer_stream waited on the producer_stream.
      static class  OrtEpApi.KernelDef_GetDomain_OrtKernelDef
      \brief Returns the operator's domain from the kernel definition.
      static class  OrtEpApi.KernelDef_GetExecutionProvider_OrtKernelDef
      \brief Returns the name of the kernel's intended execution provider.
      static class  OrtEpApi.KernelDef_GetOperatorType_OrtKernelDef
      \brief Returns the operator type from the kernel definition.
      static class  OrtEpApi.MemoryDevice_AreEqual_OrtMemoryDevice_OrtMemoryDevice
      \brief Compare two OrtMemoryDevice instances for equality.
      static class  OrtEpApi.MemoryDevice_GetDeviceId_OrtMemoryDevice
      \brief Get the device ID from an OrtMemoryDevice instance.
      static class  OrtEpApi.MemoryDevice_GetDeviceType_OrtMemoryDevice
      \brief Get the OrtMemoryInfoDeviceType value from an OrtMemoryDevice instance.
      static class  OrtEpApi.MemoryDevice_GetMemoryType_OrtMemoryDevice
      \brief Get the OrtDeviceMemoryType value from an OrtMemoryDevice instance.
      static class  OrtEpApi.MemoryDevice_GetVendorId_OrtMemoryDevice
      \brief Get the vendor ID from an OrtMemoryDevice instance.
      static class  OrtEpApi.MemoryInfo_GetMemoryDevice_OrtMemoryInfo
      \brief Get the OrtMemoryDevice from an OrtMemoryInfo instance.
      static class  OrtEpApi.NodeComputeContext_NodeName_OrtNodeComputeContext
      \brief Query a OrtNodeComputeContext for the name of the node that encapsulates the compiled/fused node.
      static class  OrtEpApi.SyncStream_GetImpl_OrtSyncStream
      \brief Get the OrtSyncStreamImpl associated with an OrtSyncStream instance.
      static class  OrtEpApi.SyncStream_GetSyncId_OrtSyncStream
      \brief Get the current sync ID for a stream.
      static class  OrtEpApi.Value_GetMemoryDevice_OrtValue
      \brief Get the OrtMemoryDevice from an OrtValue instance if it contains a Tensor.

      • CreateEpDevice

        public OrtStatus CreateEpDevice(OrtEpFactory ep_factory,
                                @Const
                                OrtHardwareDevice hardware_device,
                                @Const
                                OrtKeyValuePairs ep_metadata,
                                @Const
                                OrtKeyValuePairs ep_options,
                                @Cast(value="OrtEpDevice**")
                                PointerPointer ep_device)
        \brief Create an OrtEpDevice for the EP and an OrtHardwareDevice.
        Parameters:
        ep_factory - [in] Execution provider factory that is creating the instance.
        hardware_device - [in] Hardware device that the EP can utilize.
        ep_metadata - [in] Optional OrtKeyValuePairs instance for execution provider metadata that may be used during execution provider selection and passed to CreateEp. ep_device will copy this instance and the user should call ReleaseKeyValuePairs.
        ep_options - [in] Optional OrtKeyValuePairs instance for execution provider options that will be added to the Session configuration options if the execution provider is selected. ep_device will copy this instance and the user should call ReleaseKeyValuePairs.
        ep_device - OrtExecutionDevice that is created.
        Since:
        Version 1.22.

      • CreateEpDevice

        public OrtStatus CreateEpDevice(OrtEpFactory ep_factory,
                                @Const
                                OrtHardwareDevice hardware_device,
                                @Const
                                OrtKeyValuePairs ep_metadata,
                                @Const
                                OrtKeyValuePairs ep_options,
                                @ByPtrPtr
                                OrtEpDevice ep_device)

      • ReleaseEpDevice

        public void ReleaseEpDevice(OrtEpDevice input)

      • EpGraphSupportInfo_AddNodesToFuse

        public OrtStatus EpGraphSupportInfo_AddNodesToFuse(OrtEpGraphSupportInfo graph_support_info,
                                                   @Cast(value="const OrtNode*const*")
                                                   PointerPointer nodes,
                                                   @Cast(value="size_t")
                                                   long num_nodes,
                                                   @Const
                                                   OrtNodeFusionOptions node_fusion_options)
        \brief Specify nodes that are supported by an OrtEp and should be fused into one node. Because the nodes will be fused into one "fused node", there must not exist an unsupported node in a path between two of the provided nodes. Otherwise, the graph will become invalid. This function can be called multiple times. A subsequent call to this function will force the next set of nodes to be fused into a different node.
        Parameters:
        graph_support_info - [in] OrtEpGraphSupportInfo instance to which to add the supported nodes.
        nodes - [in] Array of nodes supported by the EP that should be fused/compiled.
        num_nodes - [in] The number of supported nodes.
        node_fusion_options - [in] Optional node fusion options. Ignored if set to NULL. \snippet{doc} snippets.dox OrtStatus Return Value
        Since:
        Version 1.23.

      • EpGraphSupportInfo_AddNodesToFuse

        public OrtStatus EpGraphSupportInfo_AddNodesToFuse(OrtEpGraphSupportInfo graph_support_info,
                                                   @Const @ByPtrPtr
                                                   OrtNode nodes,
                                                   @Cast(value="size_t")
                                                   long num_nodes,
                                                   @Const
                                                   OrtNodeFusionOptions node_fusion_options)

      • EpGraphSupportInfo_AddSingleNode

        public OrtStatus EpGraphSupportInfo_AddSingleNode(OrtEpGraphSupportInfo graph_support_info,
                                                  @Const
                                                  OrtNode node)
        \brief Specify a node that is supported by an OrtEp and should be run with a registered EP kernel.
        Parameters:
        graph_support_info - [in] OrtEpGraphSupportInfo instance to which to add the supported node.
        node - [in] The supported OrtNode instance. \snippet{doc} snippets.dox OrtStatus Return Value
        Since:
        Version 1.23.

      • NodeComputeContext_NodeName

      • NodeComputeContext_NodeName

        public OrtEpApi NodeComputeContext_NodeName(OrtEpApi.NodeComputeContext_NodeName_OrtNodeComputeContext setter)

      • EpDevice_AddAllocatorInfo

        public OrtStatus EpDevice_AddAllocatorInfo(OrtEpDevice ep_device,
                                           @Const
                                           OrtMemoryInfo allocator_memory_info)
        \brief Register an allocator with the OrtEpDevice. This allows an EP to provide OrtMemoryInfo for DEFAULT and HOST_ACCESSIBLE memory type as needed. The registered values will be used in calls to OrtEpFactory::CreateAllocator to ensure the required allocator/s are available for EP usage. Multiple calls for the same entry type will replace a previous entry. Available entries: - OrtDeviceAllocator with type of OrtDeviceMemoryType_DEFAULT - OrtDeviceAllocator with type of OrtDeviceMemoryType_HOST_ACCESSIBLE - OrtReadOnlyAllocator with type of OrtDeviceMemoryType_DEFAULT - if provided this allocator will only be used to copy initializers to the device the EP uses. ORT will use the OrtDeviceAllocator if not provided.
        Parameters:
        ep_device - [in] The OrtEpDevice instance to register the OrtMemoryInfo with.
        allocator_memory_info - [in] The OrtMemoryInfo information for the allocator. \snippet{doc} snippets.dox OrtStatus Return Value
        Since:
        Version 1.23.

        public OrtEpApi.MemoryInfo_GetMemoryDevice_OrtMemoryInfo MemoryInfo_GetMemoryDevice()

      • CreateHardwareDevice

        public OrtStatus CreateHardwareDevice(@Cast(value="OrtHardwareDeviceType")
                                      int type,
                                      @Cast(value="uint32_t")
                                      int vendor_id,
                                      @Cast(value="uint32_t")
                                      int device_id,
                                      @Cast(value="const char*")
                                      BytePointer vendor_name,
                                      @Const
                                      OrtKeyValuePairs metadata,
                                      @Cast(value="OrtHardwareDevice**")
                                      PointerPointer hardware_device)
        \brief Create an OrtHardwareDevice. \note Called within OrtEpFactory::GetSupportedDevices to create a new hardware device (e.g., virtual).
        Parameters:
        type - [in] The hardware device type.
        vendor_id - [in] The hardware device's vendor identifier.
        device_id - [in] The hardware device's identifier.
        vendor_name - [in] The hardware device's vendor name as a null-terminated string. Copied by ORT.
        metadata - [in] Optional OrtKeyValuePairs instance for hardware device metadata that may be queried by applications via OrtApi::GetEpDevices(). Refer to onnxruntime_ep_device_ep_metadata_keys.h for common OrtHardwareDevice metadata keys.
        hardware_device - [out] Output parameter set to the new OrtHardwareDevice instance that is created. Must be release with ReleaseHardwareDevice(). \snippet{doc} snippets.dox OrtStatus Return Value
        Since:
        Version 1.24.

      • CreateHardwareDevice

        public OrtStatus CreateHardwareDevice(@Cast(value="OrtHardwareDeviceType")
                                      int type,
                                      @Cast(value="uint32_t")
                                      int vendor_id,
                                      @Cast(value="uint32_t")
                                      int device_id,
                                      @Cast(value="const char*")
                                      BytePointer vendor_name,
                                      @Const
                                      OrtKeyValuePairs metadata,
                                      @ByPtrPtr
                                      OrtHardwareDevice hardware_device)

      • CreateHardwareDevice

        public OrtStatus CreateHardwareDevice(@Cast(value="OrtHardwareDeviceType")
                                      int type,
                                      @Cast(value="uint32_t")
                                      int vendor_id,
                                      @Cast(value="uint32_t")
                                      int device_id,
                                      String vendor_name,
                                      @Const
                                      OrtKeyValuePairs metadata,
                                      @ByPtrPtr
                                      OrtHardwareDevice hardware_device)

      • ReleaseHardwareDevice

        public void ReleaseHardwareDevice(OrtHardwareDevice input)

      • CreateKernelRegistry

        public OrtStatus CreateKernelRegistry(@Cast(value="OrtKernelRegistry**")
                                      PointerPointer kernel_registry)
        \brief Creates an empty kernel registry. A kernel registry contains kernel creation information for every operator kernel supported by an EP. \remarks Refer to OrtEp::GetKernelRegistry, which returns an EP's kernel registry to ORT.
        Parameters:
        kernel_registry - [out] Output parameter set to the new OrtKernelRegistry instance. Must be released with OrtEpApi::ReleaseKernelRegistry. \snippet{doc} snippets.dox OrtStatus Return Value
        Since:
        Version 1.24.

      • CreateKernelRegistry

        public OrtStatus CreateKernelRegistry(@ByPtrPtr
                                      OrtKernelRegistry kernel_registry)

      • ReleaseKernelRegistry

        public void ReleaseKernelRegistry(OrtKernelRegistry input)

      • KernelRegistry_AddKernel

        public OrtStatus KernelRegistry_AddKernel(OrtKernelRegistry kernel_registry,
                                          @Const
                                          OrtKernelDef kernel_def,
                                          OrtKernelCreateFunc kernel_create_func,
                                          Pointer kernel_create_func_state)
        \brief Adds kernel creation information for a supported operator kernel to the given kernel registry. \remarks Refer to OrtEp::GetKernelRegistry, which returns an EP's kernel registry to ORT.
        Parameters:
        kernel_registry - [in] The OrtKernelRegistry instance.
        kernel_def - [in] The kernel definition, which includes operator type, version, EP name, type constraints, etc.
        kernel_create_func - [in] Function that creates an instance of the operator kernel as a OrtKernelImpl instance.
        kernel_create_func_state - [in] Custom state passed to the kernel creation function. Can be null. \snippet{doc} snippets.dox OrtStatus Return Value
        Since:
        Version 1.24.

      • CreateKernelDefBuilder

        public OrtStatus CreateKernelDefBuilder(@Cast(value="OrtKernelDefBuilder**")
                                        PointerPointer kernel_def_builder_out)
        \brief Creates a kernel definition builder used to create instances of OrtKernelDef.
        Parameters:
        kernel_def_builder_out - [out] Output parameter set to the new OrtKernelDefBuilder instance. Must be released with OrtEpApi::ReleaseKernelDefBuilder(). \snippet{doc} snippets.dox OrtStatus Return Value
        Since:
        Version 1.24.

      • CreateKernelDefBuilder

        public OrtStatus CreateKernelDefBuilder(@ByPtrPtr
                                        OrtKernelDefBuilder kernel_def_builder_out)

      • ReleaseKernelDefBuilder

        public void ReleaseKernelDefBuilder(OrtKernelDefBuilder input)

      • KernelDefBuilder_SetOperatorType

        public OrtStatus KernelDefBuilder_SetOperatorType(OrtKernelDefBuilder kernel_def_builder,
                                                  @Cast(value="const char*")
                                                  BytePointer op_type)
        \brief Sets the kernel's operator type.
        Parameters:
        kernel_def_builder - [in] The OrtKernelDefBuilder instance.
        op_type - [in] A null-terminated string representing the operator type. \snippet{doc} snippets.dox OrtStatus Return Value
        Since:
        Version 1.24.

      • KernelDefBuilder_SetOperatorType

        public OrtStatus KernelDefBuilder_SetOperatorType(OrtKernelDefBuilder kernel_def_builder,
                                                  String op_type)

      • KernelDefBuilder_SetDomain

        public OrtStatus KernelDefBuilder_SetDomain(OrtKernelDefBuilder kernel_def_builder,
                                            @Cast(value="const char*")
                                            BytePointer domain)
        \brief Sets the kernel's domain.
        Parameters:
        kernel_def_builder - [in] The OrtKernelDefBuilder instance.
        domain - [in] A null-terminated string representing the operator's domain. \snippet{doc} snippets.dox OrtStatus Return Value
        Since:
        Version 1.24.

      • KernelDefBuilder_SetDomain

        public OrtStatus KernelDefBuilder_SetDomain(OrtKernelDefBuilder kernel_def_builder,
                                            String domain)

      • KernelDefBuilder_SetSinceVersion

        public OrtStatus KernelDefBuilder_SetSinceVersion(OrtKernelDefBuilder kernel_def_builder,
                                                  int since_version_start,
                                                  int since_version_end)
        \brief Sets the kernel's opset version range that is supported.
        Parameters:
        kernel_def_builder - [in] The OrtKernelDefBuilder instance.
        since_version_start - [in] The starting opset version that is supported.
        since_version_end - [in] The ending opset version (inclusive) that is supported. Can be set equal to the starting version to indicate that only one version is supported. \snippet{doc} snippets.dox OrtStatus Return Value
        Since:
        Version 1.24.

      • KernelDefBuilder_SetExecutionProvider

        public OrtStatus KernelDefBuilder_SetExecutionProvider(OrtKernelDefBuilder kernel_def_builder,
                                                       @Cast(value="const char*")
                                                       BytePointer ep_name)
        \brief Sets the name of the kernel's intended execution provider.
        Parameters:
        kernel_def_builder - [in] The OrtKernelDefBuilder instance.
        ep_name - [in] A null-terminated string representing the execution provider's name. \snippet{doc} snippets.dox OrtStatus Return Value
        Since:
        Version 1.24.

      • KernelDefBuilder_SetExecutionProvider

        public OrtStatus KernelDefBuilder_SetExecutionProvider(OrtKernelDefBuilder kernel_def_builder,
                                                       String ep_name)

      • KernelDefBuilder_SetInputMemType

        public OrtStatus KernelDefBuilder_SetInputMemType(OrtKernelDefBuilder kernel_def_builder,
                                                  @Cast(value="size_t")
                                                  long input_index,
                                                  @Cast(value="OrtMemType")
                                                  int mem_type)
        \brief Sets the memory type for a kernel input.
        Parameters:
        kernel_def_builder - [in] The OrtKernelDefBuilder instance.
        input_index - [in] The index of the input.
        mem_type - [in] The input's memory type. \snippet{doc} snippets.dox OrtStatus Return Value
        Since:
        Version 1.24.

      • KernelDefBuilder_SetOutputMemType

        public OrtStatus KernelDefBuilder_SetOutputMemType(OrtKernelDefBuilder kernel_def_builder,
                                                   @Cast(value="size_t")
                                                   long output_index,
                                                   @Cast(value="OrtMemType")
                                                   int mem_type)
        \brief Sets the memory type for a kernel output.
        Parameters:
        kernel_def_builder - [in] The OrtKernelDefBuilder instance.
        output_index - [in] The index of the output.
        mem_type - [in] The output's memory type. \snippet{doc} snippets.dox OrtStatus Return Value
        Since:
        Version 1.24.

      • KernelDefBuilder_AddTypeConstraint

        public OrtStatus KernelDefBuilder_AddTypeConstraint(OrtKernelDefBuilder kernel_def_builder,
                                                    @Cast(value="const char*")
                                                    BytePointer arg_name,
                                                    @Cast(value="const OrtDataType*const*")
                                                    PointerPointer types,
                                                    @Cast(value="size_t")
                                                    long num_types)
        \brief Adds type constraints for a kernel argument represented as a string (e.g., "T").
        Parameters:
        kernel_def_builder - [in] The OrtKernelDefBuilder instance.
        arg_name - [in] A null-terminated string representing the argument to constrain (e.g., "T").
        types - [in] Array of OrtDataType instances representing allowed types for the argument. Must contain num_types elements.
        num_types - [in] The number of OrtDataType elements in the types array. \snippet{doc} snippets.dox OrtStatus Return Value
        Since:
        Version 1.24.

      • KernelDefBuilder_AddTypeConstraint

        public OrtStatus KernelDefBuilder_AddTypeConstraint(OrtKernelDefBuilder kernel_def_builder,
                                                    @Cast(value="const char*")
                                                    BytePointer arg_name,
                                                    @Const @ByPtrPtr
                                                    OrtDataType types,
                                                    @Cast(value="size_t")
                                                    long num_types)

      • KernelDefBuilder_AddTypeConstraint

        public OrtStatus KernelDefBuilder_AddTypeConstraint(OrtKernelDefBuilder kernel_def_builder,
                                                    String arg_name,
                                                    @Const @ByPtrPtr
                                                    OrtDataType types,
                                                    @Cast(value="size_t")
                                                    long num_types)

      • KernelDefBuilder_AddInputOutputAliases

        public OrtStatus KernelDefBuilder_AddInputOutputAliases(OrtKernelDefBuilder kernel_def_builder,
                                                        @Const
                                                        IntPointer input_indices,
                                                        @Const
                                                        IntPointer output_indices,
                                                        @Cast(value="size_t")
                                                        long num_io_indices)
        \brief Adds aliases for the given input and output pairs. \note Used for operators like Identity and Reshape to allow ORT to reuse the input buffer for the output without modification.
        Parameters:
        kernel_def_builder - [in] The OrtKernelDefBuilder instance.
        input_indices - [in] Array of input indices. Array must contain num_io_indices elements.
        output_indices - [in] Array of output indices. Each output index is aliased with a corresponding input index in input_indices. Array must contain num_io_indices elements.
        num_io_indices - [in] The number of input/output index pairs to alias. \snippet{doc} snippets.dox OrtStatus Return Value
        Since:
        Version 1.24.

      • KernelDefBuilder_AddInputOutputAliases

        public OrtStatus KernelDefBuilder_AddInputOutputAliases(OrtKernelDefBuilder kernel_def_builder,
                                                        @Const
                                                        IntBuffer input_indices,
                                                        @Const
                                                        IntBuffer output_indices,
                                                        @Cast(value="size_t")
                                                        long num_io_indices)

      • KernelDefBuilder_AddInputOutputAliases

        public OrtStatus KernelDefBuilder_AddInputOutputAliases(OrtKernelDefBuilder kernel_def_builder,
                                                        @Const
                                                        int[] input_indices,
                                                        @Const
                                                        int[] output_indices,
                                                        @Cast(value="size_t")
                                                        long num_io_indices)

      • KernelDefBuilder_AddInputOutputMutableAliases

        public OrtStatus KernelDefBuilder_AddInputOutputMutableAliases(OrtKernelDefBuilder kernel_def_builder,
                                                               @Const
                                                               IntPointer input_indices,
                                                               @Const
                                                               IntPointer output_indices,
                                                               @Cast(value="size_t")
                                                               long num_io_indices)
        \brief Adds mutable aliases for the given input and output pairs. \note Allows ORT to reuse and *modify* an input buffer (in-place) for the output buffer. This is also known as "MayInplace" within the ORT codebase.
        Parameters:
        kernel_def_builder - [in] The OrtKernelDefBuilder instance.
        input_indices - [in] Array of input indices. Array must contain num_io_indices elements.
        output_indices - [in] Array of output indices. Each output index is aliased with a corresponding input index in input_indices. Array must contain num_io_indices elements.
        num_io_indices - [in] The number of input/output index pairs to alias. \snippet{doc} snippets.dox OrtStatus Return Value
        Since:
        Version 1.24.

      • KernelDefBuilder_AddInputOutputMutableAliases

        public OrtStatus KernelDefBuilder_AddInputOutputMutableAliases(OrtKernelDefBuilder kernel_def_builder,
                                                               @Const
                                                               IntBuffer input_indices,
                                                               @Const
                                                               IntBuffer output_indices,
                                                               @Cast(value="size_t")
                                                               long num_io_indices)

      • KernelDefBuilder_AddInputOutputMutableAliases

        public OrtStatus KernelDefBuilder_AddInputOutputMutableAliases(OrtKernelDefBuilder kernel_def_builder,
                                                               @Const
                                                               int[] input_indices,
                                                               @Const
                                                               int[] output_indices,
                                                               @Cast(value="size_t")
                                                               long num_io_indices)

        public OrtStatus KernelDefBuilder_Build(OrtKernelDefBuilder kernel_def_builder,
                                        @Cast(value="OrtKernelDef**")
                                        PointerPointer kernel_def_out)
        \brief Creates a OrtKernelDef instance from the given kernel definition builder.
        Parameters:
        kernel_def_builder - [in] The OrtKernelDefBuilder instance.
        kernel_def_out - [out] The new OrtKernelDef instance. \snippet{doc} snippets.dox OrtStatus Return Value

        public OrtStatus KernelDef_GetSinceVersion(@Const
                                           OrtKernelDef kernel_def,
                                           IntPointer start_version,
                                           IntPointer end_version)
        \brief Gets the kernel's opset version range that is supported.
        Parameters:
        kernel_def - [in] The OrtKernelDef instance.
        start_version - [out] Output parameter set to the starting opset version that is supported.
        end_version - [out] Output parameter set to the ending opset version (inclusive) that is supported. \snippet{doc} snippets.dox OrtStatus Return Value
        Since:
        Version 1.24.

                                           OrtKernelDef kernel_def,
                                           @Cast(value="size_t")
                                           long input_index,
                                           @Cast(value="OrtMemType*")
                                           IntPointer mem_type)
        \brief Gets the memory type for a kernel input.
        Parameters:
        kernel_def - [in] The OrtKernelDef instance.
        input_index - [in] The index of the input.
        mem_type - [out] Output parameter set to the input's memory type. \snippet{doc} snippets.dox OrtStatus Return Value
        Since:
        Version 1.24.

      • GetTensorDataType

        public OrtStatus GetTensorDataType(@Cast(value="ONNXTensorElementDataType")
                                   int elem_type,
                                   @Cast(value="const OrtDataType**")
                                   PointerPointer out)
        \brief Gets the OrtDataType that represents the data type for a tensor of the given element type.
        Parameters:
        elem_type - [in] The tensor's element type.
        out - [out] Output parameter set to the OrtDataType. Owned by ORT and must not be released. \snippet{doc} snippets.dox OrtStatus Return Value
        Since:
        Version 1.24.

      • GetTensorDataType

        public OrtStatus GetTensorDataType(@Cast(value="ONNXTensorElementDataType")
                                   int elem_type,
                                   @Const @ByPtrPtr
                                   OrtDataType out)

      • EpGraphSupportInfo_LookUpKernel

        public OrtStatus EpGraphSupportInfo_LookUpKernel(OrtEpGraphSupportInfo graph_support_info,
                                                 @Const
                                                 OrtNode node,
                                                 @Cast(value="const OrtKernelDef**")
                                                 PointerPointer out_kernel_def)
        \brief Gets the kernel definition for a given node, if any exists for the calling execution provider. Used within OrtEp::GetCapability() to get the registered kernel definition for the given node. The kernel definition is set to NULL if there is no registered kernel definition for the node and execution provider.
        Parameters:
        graph_support_info - [in] The OrtEpGraphSupportInfo instance to query.
        node - [in] The node for which to look up a kernel definition.
        out_kernel_def - [out] Output parameter set to the OrtKernelDef or NULL. Owned by ORT and must not be released. \snippet{doc} snippets.dox OrtStatus Return Value
        Since:
        Version 1.24.

      • EpGraphSupportInfo_LookUpKernel

        public OrtStatus EpGraphSupportInfo_LookUpKernel(OrtEpGraphSupportInfo graph_support_info,
                                                 @Const
                                                 OrtNode node,
                                                 @Const @ByPtrPtr
                                                 OrtKernelDef out_kernel_def)

      • SharedPrePackedWeightCache_StoreWeightData

        public OrtStatus SharedPrePackedWeightCache_StoreWeightData(OrtSharedPrePackedWeightCache prepacked_weight_cache,
                                                            @Cast(value="void**")
                                                            PointerPointer buffer_data_ptrs,
                                                            @Cast(value="size_t*")
                                                            SizeTPointer buffer_data_sizes,
                                                            @Cast(value="size_t")
                                                            long num_buffers)
        \brief Sets one or more data buffers that collectively hold the pre-packed data for a single shared weight. \note Used within the implementation of OrtKernelImpl::PrePackWeight() when the kernel wants to share pre-packed weight data with other kernels. The buffer data MUST be allocated with the OrtAllocator provided to OrtKernelImpl::PrePack. \note Ownership of weight data transfers to the OrtSharedPrePackedWeightCache instance on success. If this function returns an error status, the caller retains ownership of the weight data. \note Subsequent calls with the same OrtSharedPrePackedWeightCache instance release and replace the old data.
        Parameters:
        prepacked_weight_cache - [in] The OrtSharedPrePackedWeightCache instance.
        buffer_data_ptrs - [in] An array of buffer data pointers that collectively hold the pre-packed data for a single shared weight. Note that sometimes a single weight may have multiple pre-packed buffers and it is up to the kernel implementation to determine how to split the data into multiple buffers (if desired).
        buffer_data_sizes - [in] An array of buffer byte sizes, one per element in buffer_data_ptrs.
        num_buffers - [in] The number of buffers used to store the data for the shared pre-packed weight. Specifies the number of elements in the buffer_data_ptrs and buffer_data_sizes arrays. \snippet{doc} snippets.dox OrtStatus Return Value
        Since:
        Version 1.24.

      • SharedPrePackedWeightCache_StoreWeightData

        public OrtStatus SharedPrePackedWeightCache_StoreWeightData(OrtSharedPrePackedWeightCache prepacked_weight_cache,
                                                            @Cast(value="void**") @ByPtrPtr
                                                            Pointer buffer_data_ptrs,
                                                            @Cast(value="size_t*")
                                                            SizeTPointer buffer_data_sizes,
                                                            @Cast(value="size_t")
                                                            long num_buffers)

      • KernelInfo_GetEp

        public OrtStatus KernelInfo_GetEp(@Const
                                  OrtKernelInfo info,
                                  @Cast(value="const OrtEp**")
                                  PointerPointer ep)
        \brief Get the OrtEp instance to which the node is assigned from the OrtKernelInfo. \note Used within OrtKernelImpl implementations to obtain a reference to the OrtEp.
        Parameters:
        info - [in] The ::OrtKernelInfo instance.
        ep - [out] Output parameter set to the OrtEp instance associated with the OrtKernelInfo. \snippet{doc} snippets.dox OrtStatus Return Value
        Since:
        Version 1.24

      • KernelInfo_GetEp

        public OrtStatus KernelInfo_GetEp(@Const
                                  OrtKernelInfo info,
                                  @Const @ByPtrPtr
                                  OrtEp ep)

      • DeviceEpIncompatibilityDetails_SetDetails

        public OrtStatus DeviceEpIncompatibilityDetails_SetDetails(OrtDeviceEpIncompatibilityDetails details,
                                                           @Cast(value="uint32_t")
                                                           int reasons_bitmask,
                                                           int error_code,
                                                           @Cast(value="const char*")
                                                           BytePointer notes)
        \brief Set the details of an OrtDeviceEpIncompatibilityDetails instance. Used by execution provider factories to set incompatibility details in their GetHardwareDeviceIncompatibilityDetails implementation. ORT creates and initializes the object before passing it to the EP, so calling this function is optional. The EP uses this function to set incompatibility information when the device is not compatible.
        Parameters:
        details - [in,out] The OrtDeviceEpIncompatibilityDetails instance to update.
        reasons_bitmask - [in] Bitmask of OrtDeviceEpIncompatibilityReason values. (0 = no incompatibility).
        error_code - [in] Optional EP-specific error code (0 = no error).
        notes - [in] Optional human-readable notes. Can be null. \snippet{doc} snippets.dox OrtStatus Return Value
        Since:
        Version 1.24.

      • DeviceEpIncompatibilityDetails_SetDetails

        public OrtStatus DeviceEpIncompatibilityDetails_SetDetails(OrtDeviceEpIncompatibilityDetails details,
                                                           @Cast(value="uint32_t")
                                                           int reasons_bitmask,
                                                           int error_code,
                                                           String notes)

      • CreateIfKernel

        public OrtStatus CreateIfKernel(@Const
                                OrtKernelInfo kernel_info,
                                @Cast(value="OrtKernelImpl**")
                                PointerPointer kernel_out)
        \brief Creates an OrtKernelImpl instance for an If operator. Control flow operators require access to ORT session internals to orchestrate subgraph operations. This function allows an EP to create a properly configured OrtKernelImpl with access to ORT internals that the EP can add to its kernel registry. An EP is required to create an OrtKernelDef that keeps input[0] ('cond') on the CPU (i.e., OrtMemTypeCPUInput) as this input is used by CPU logic. The output should remain on the device (i.e., OrtMemTypeDefault), which is the default setting, to avoid copying to/from CPU. Example kernel definition (CXX API): Ort::KernelDef kernel_def = Ort::KernelDefBuilder() .SetDomain("").SetOperatorType("If").SetSinceVersion(21, 22) .SetExecutionProvider("MyEp") .SetInputMemType(0, OrtMemTypeCPUInput) // 'cond' on CPU .SetOutputMemType(0, OrtMemTypeDefault) // output on EP device .AddTypeConstraint("B", ...) .AddTypeConstraint("V", ...).Build();
        Parameters:
        kernel_info - [in] The ::OrtKernelInfo instance for an If node. This function returns error ORT_FAIL if the opset version specified by kernel_info is unsupported.
        kernel_out - [out] Output parameter set to the OrtKernelImpl instance for the If node. Must be released via ::ReleaseKernelImpl, unless ownership is transferred to ORT (see OrtKernelCreateFunc and ::KernelRegistry_AddKernel()). \snippet{doc} snippets.dox OrtStatus Return Value
        Since:
        Version 1.24

      • CreateIfKernel

        public OrtStatus CreateIfKernel(@Const
                                OrtKernelInfo kernel_info,
                                @ByPtrPtr
                                OrtKernelImpl kernel_out)

      • CreateLoopKernel

        public OrtStatus CreateLoopKernel(@Const
                                  OrtKernelInfo kernel_info,
                                  OrtLoopKernelHelper helper,
                                  @Cast(value="OrtKernelImpl**")
                                  PointerPointer kernel_out)
        \brief Creates an OrtKernelImpl instance for a Loop operator. Control flow operators require access to ORT session internals to orchestrate subgraph operations. This function allows an EP to create a properly configured OrtKernelImpl with access to ORT internals that the EP can add to its kernel registry. An EP is required to create an OrtKernelDef that keeps input[0] ('M') and input[1] ('cond') on the CPU (i.e., OrtMemTypeCPUInput) as these inputs are used by CPU logic. Input[2] ('v_initial') and the output should remain on the device (i.e., OrtMemTypeDefault), which is the default setting, to avoid copying to/from CPU. Example kernel definition (CXX API): Ort::KernelDef kernel_def = Ort::KernelDefBuilder() .SetDomain("").SetOperatorType("Loop").SetSinceVersion(21, 22) .SetExecutionProvider("MyEp") .SetInputMemType(0, OrtMemTypeCPUInput) // 'M' on CPU .SetInputMemType(1, OrtMemTypeCPUInput) // 'cond' on CPU .SetInputMemType(2, OrtMemTypeDefault) // 'v_initial' on EP device .SetOutputMemType(0, OrtMemTypeDefault) // output on EP device .AddTypeConstraint("I", ...) .AddTypeConstraint("B", ...) .AddTypeConstraint("V", ...).Build();
        Parameters:
        kernel_info - [in] The ::OrtKernelInfo instance for a Loop node. This function returns error ORT_FAIL if the opset version specified by kernel_info is unsupported.
        helper - [in] A OrtLoopKernelHelper instance that contains helper functions that ORT calls during kernel execution to operate on tensors allocated with the EP's device memory. ORT will call OrtLoopKernelHelper::Release() to release the helper and its resources.
        kernel_out - [out] Output parameter set to the OrtKernelImpl instance for the Loop node. Must be released via ::ReleaseKernelImpl, unless ownership is transferred to ORT (see OrtKernelCreateFunc and ::KernelRegistry_AddKernel()). \snippet{doc} snippets.dox OrtStatus Return Value
        Since:
        Version 1.24

      • CreateLoopKernel

        public OrtStatus CreateLoopKernel(@Const
                                  OrtKernelInfo kernel_info,
                                  OrtLoopKernelHelper helper,
                                  @ByPtrPtr
                                  OrtKernelImpl kernel_out)

      • CreateScanKernel

        public OrtStatus CreateScanKernel(@Const
                                  OrtKernelInfo kernel_info,
                                  OrtScanKernelHelper helper,
                                  @Cast(value="OrtKernelImpl**")
                                  PointerPointer kernel_out)
        \brief Creates an OrtKernelImpl instance for a Scan operator. Does not support opset versions older than 9. Control flow operators require access to ORT session internals to orchestrate subgraph operations. This function allows an EP to create a properly configured OrtKernelImpl with access to ORT internals that the EP can add to its kernel registry. It is recommended that an EP create an OrtKernelDef that keeps the inputs and outputs on the EP's device (i.e., OrtMemTypeDefault), which is the default setting, to avoid copying to/from CPU. Example kernel definition (CXX API): Ort::KernelDef kernel_def = Ort::KernelDefBuilder() .SetDomain("").SetOperatorType("Scan").SetSinceVersion(21, 22) .SetExecutionProvider("MyEp") .SetInputMemType(0, OrtMemTypeDefault) // input[0] on EP device .SetOutputMemType(0, OrtMemTypeDefault) // output[0] on EP device .AddTypeConstraint("V", ...).Build();
        Parameters:
        kernel_info - [in] The ::OrtKernelInfo instance for a Scan node. This function returns error ORT_FAIL if the opset version specified by kernel_info is unsupported.
        helper - [in] A OrtScanKernelHelper instance that contains helper functions that ORT calls during kernel execution to operate on tensors allocated with the EP's device memory. ORT will call OrtScanKernelHelper::Release() to release the helper and its resources.
        kernel_out - [out] Output parameter set to the OrtKernelImpl instance for the Scan node. Must be released via ::ReleaseKernelImpl, unless ownership is transferred to ORT (see OrtKernelCreateFunc and ::KernelRegistry_AddKernel()). \snippet{doc} snippets.dox OrtStatus Return Value
        Since:
        Version 1.24

      • CreateScanKernel

        public OrtStatus CreateScanKernel(@Const
                                  OrtKernelInfo kernel_info,
                                  OrtScanKernelHelper helper,
                                  @ByPtrPtr
                                  OrtKernelImpl kernel_out)

      • ReleaseKernelImpl

        public void ReleaseKernelImpl(OrtKernelImpl input)

      • GetEnvConfigEntries

        public OrtStatus GetEnvConfigEntries(@Cast(value="OrtKeyValuePairs**")
                                     PointerPointer config_entries)
        \brief Gets a new OrtKeyValuePairs instance containing a copy of all configuration entries set on the environment. \note An application provides environment-level configuration options for execution provider libraries by using keys with the prefix 'ep_factory.\.'. Ex: the key 'ep_factory.my_ep.some_ep_key' represents a key named 'some_ep_key' that is meant to be consumed by an execution provider named 'my_ep'. Refer to the specific execution provider's documentation for valid keys and values. \note Refer to onnxruntime_env_config_keys.h for common configuration entry keys and their supported values.
        Parameters:
        config_entries - [out] Output parameter set to the OrtKeyValuePairs instance containing all configuration entries. Must be released via OrtApi::ReleaseKeyValuePairs. \snippet{doc} snippets.dox OrtStatus Return Value
        Since:
        Version 1.24

      • GetEnvConfigEntries

        public OrtStatus GetEnvConfigEntries(@ByPtrPtr
                                     OrtKeyValuePairs config_entries)
